🛞 EUC World → G2 HUD

Sends live EUC stats to your Even G2 glasses.
Both apps must be running on the same phone.

Find it in EUC World → Settings → Web Server.
The plugin will auto-try localhost, 127.0.0.1, and more.
Working URL: not found yet
Use this if auto-probe fails but the test button finds a working URL, or start simulator data for screenshots.
Initializing…
Tick count (proves interval is running): 0
Use this button as a fallback while we debug hardware gestures.
Current mode: full HUD
Use this to see what the real glasses send when you tap or double tap. 
Waiting for EvenHub events…
Waiting for data…
